description: CompositionGrey and purple striped sweater made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neck, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, printed brand collection on the left chest and a ribbed hemFittingRegular Wash careHand wash with cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak, hang, twist or wringDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsWelcome the winter in style in this sweater from spykar. Stylish to the hilt and snug on the body, this sweater is a great addition to your wardrobe. Layer this over t-shirts or shirts, and jeans.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in sweatersHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
